reviews.comment:
Parece un chiste. Una empanada era lo mismo y más barato. Un desastre YPF full.

(Translated by Google)
It's a joke. An empanada was the same price and cheaper. YPF full was a disaster.

reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención del personal de playa y del Full. Lo malo que tenés que comprar una ficha para echarle aire a las gomas, al menos deberían tener consideración con los que cargamos combustible.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service from the gas station staff and the Full service station. The only downside is that you have to buy a token to inflate your tires; they should at least be considerate of those of us who fill up with fuel.
